title: selago angolensis
intro: Selago angolensis, also known as Cape cary, is a succulent plant species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selago angolensis is typically made into teas, infusions, or ointments to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
